title: Blazed by the Caves
description: Blazed by the Caves expands your world with new biomes, dungeons, and adventures — powered by Terralith, Biomes O’ Plenty, and BlazeandCave’s Advancements Pack to make every journey more rewarding
body: Blazed by the Caves expands your world with new biomes, dungeons, and adventures — powered by Terralith, Biomes O’ Plenty, and BlazeandCave’s Advancements Pack to make every journey more rewarding.
